acceptanceBar: consumed authority + kernel receipt head remain consumed across a REAL kill -9 (replay refused)
residual: two-file consistent rollback needs external monotonic source (out of scope: no AUMLOK v3/hardware-roots/threshold-keys)
nodeFixes: esbuild-bundle scripts/child-consume.ts to plain ESM (target node18) + spawn bare `node child.mjs` (removed --experimental-transform-types, Node>=22.6-only, which broke child startup on Node 20)

parent resolves each child on the 'close' event (not 'exit'): 'exit' could fire before the final stdout 'data' reached the parent; under vitest console interception on Node 20 that raced the concurrent test to an empty buffer (0 prepares). Belt-and-braces: child emits via synchronous writeSync(1,...); store writer-lock treats an empty/partial (in-progress) lock as live-contended, not reclaimable-stale (closes a two-writer TOCTOU).
